subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-12-04
subcodes.first_line: Those who are uninformed of the world of reality, who do not comprehend the
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوسی که خبر از عالم حقیقت و تتبع در کائنات ندارند اکتشاف حقایق
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as educator, @creation of the world, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @the human soul, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness
